Meta.tagline: Team battle operations for SFL — official ruleset

Landing.heroLead: SFScrim is the team battle operations tool for SF6. Vanguard / Midfield / Champion lineups, home & away, mandatory appearances, victory points — all SFL-compliant. The era of typing lineups by hand mid-stream is over.

order.title: Lineup management
order.desc: Vanguard / midfield / champion + sub. Away-first → home response is automated.

rules.title: SFL-compliant
rules.desc: Playoff 70pt / Grand Final 90pt auto-switching. Mandatory appearance tracking built-in.

fourVsFour.title: 4v4 ready
fourVsFour.desc: Built-in support for the Esports Nations Cup format.

i18n.title: Multilingual
i18n.desc: Instant switch between Japanese and English. Ready for international pros.

Scrim.emptyHint: Lineup input / score tracking UI will be added in follow-up issues. For now only ID and format are persisted. Reloading keeps state via localStorage.
